timeline.text: Transplanted into Autopot XL; hand-watering begins
2–3 nodes, vigorous, compact, no purple; deprioritized relative to A and D
~2–3 nodes, vigorous, compact, no purple; healthy
2 nodes, no purple, healthy and compact
One of two strongest plants; no purple, vigorous
Excellent radial symmetry; healthy dark green; most uniform plant; no deficiencies
**Topped above node 4**; healthy going in; LST target ~Apr 17–19
Recovery Day 6; most vigorous canopy; **LST due now**; morning moisture drydown to 3.57% (autopot dry cycle
densest canopy of the four; broad dark-green fan leaves; **LST overdue** (Day 7 post-topping); moisture stable ~27%
darker blue-green; densest canopy; **LST critically overdue** (Day 8 post-topping); moisture spiked to 58% at 14:00 (autopot afternoon feeding

note.text: Day 37, eight days post-topping: densest and most vigorous canopy — darker blue-green broad fan leaves; autopot fed aggressively in the afternoon (moisture spiked to 58%); LST critically overdue. See [2026-04-20](../daily/2026-04-20.md).
